events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, was born Richard Starkey in Liverpool in 1940.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six today! From humble beginnings to global superstardom, Ringo Starr's unique drumming helped define the sound of The Beatles. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May was born in Hampton Hill, London, in 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God & Astrophysicist
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! Beyond the iconic riffs with Queen, he's also an astrophysicist. Is there anything this man can't do?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, was born in Dartford, Kent, in 1943.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young today! Mick Jagger, the inimitable frontman of The Rolling Stones, continues to defy expectations with his legendary stage presence. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched in the USA
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, Music Television (MTV) officially launched in the United States, famously kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star?
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed the music landscape forever. Its first video, 'Video Killed The Radio Star', proved ironically prescient for some, but what an impact it had!

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis's iconic debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was released on this day in 1994, launching the Britpop era.

angles.name: Britpop Begins
angles.copy: Twenty-two years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music. Which track from their debut album still gets you singing along?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, an iconic counterculture event of the 1960s, kicked off on this day in 1969 in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. What's your favourite memory or performance from the legendary festival?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: On this day in 1977, the world mourned the passing of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King today. Forty-nine years since we lost Elvis Presley, but his music and legacy continue to shake, rattle, and roll.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Influential rapper Tupac Shakur passed away on this day in 1996, following a shooting in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Thirty years ago today, the music world lost an icon. Remembering the enduring impact and powerful lyrics of Tupac Shakur.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: On this day in 1970, the world lost guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, aged just 27.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago, we said goodbye to Jimi Hendrix. His groundbreaking guitar work continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', featuring its iconic zebra crossing cover, was released in the UK on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. The music, the cover – it's all legendary. What's your go-to track from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, was born in Akron, Ohio, in 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, her voice and attitude with The Pretenders remain unmatched.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis co-founder and frontman Liam Gallagher was born in Manchester in 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! The voice of a generation, still bringing that swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' single released in the UK
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic peace anthem, 'Imagine', was released as a single in the UK on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' single touched hearts in the UK. Its message of peace and hope is as relevant as ever.

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple introduced the original iPod on this day in 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket' and revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple unveiled the first iPod. It changed how we listened to music forever. Did you have one of the originals?

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: Global James Bond Day marks the anniversary of the premiere of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in London in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: It's Global James Bond Day! Celebrating 007's enduring legacy since 'Dr. No' premiered in 1962. What's your favourite Bond film or theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The iconic musician, songwriter, and peace activist John Lennon was born in Liverpool in 1940.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the unparalleled talent and enduring spirit of John Lennon. His music continues to inspire.
